name: Just. Download.
compose:
name: slashnode-just-download
services:
  web:
    image: codeberg.org/highghlow/just-download:v1.0.9
    container_name: just-download
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      LOCK_TRANSMISSION_CONFIG: '1'
      CONFIG_LOCATION: /config/config.json
      CONFIG: '{"indexers": [], "transmission": {"host": "transmission_server_1", "port": 9091}}'
    volumes:
      - web_data-config:/config
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3684:5000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-config:
    name: slashnode-just-download_web_data-config
